mods.name: Boost Controller
mods.description: The simplest and most effective first mod for the R34 GT-R. Safely raise boost on the RB26DETT for an instant 30–50hp increase.
mods.partNumbers: HKS EVC 7 45003-AK012, GReddy Profec B Spec II
mods.installNotes: Install inline with the wastegate control solenoid. Start at stock boost and raise in 1 psi increments. Monitor knock and AFR. Stock turbos max around 16 psi before efficiency drops.

mods.name: Full Exhaust System
mods.description: A 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system transforms the RB26DETT sound from muted to legendary. Essential for any power build.
mods.partNumbers: HKS Hi-Power 409 31006-AN022, Tomei Expreme Ti R34
mods.installNotes: Full replacement from downpipe to tips. 3-inch diameter is ideal. Titanium systems save 5–8kg. Bolt-on to factory hangers. 2 hour install.

mods.name: Front-Mount Intercooler
mods.description: Upgrade from the factory side-mount intercoolers to a large FMIC for significantly lower intake temps and consistent power delivery.
mods.partNumbers: HKS R-Type FMIC 13001-AN013, GReddy V-Layout FMIC Kit
mods.installNotes: Remove factory side-mount units. Route piping to front-mount core. The V-layout design preserves some factory look. Use silicone couplers with T-bolt clamps. 4+ hours.

mods.name: Fuel System Upgrade
mods.description: Larger injectors and a high-flow fuel pump remove the fueling bottleneck that limits the RB26 at higher boost levels.
mods.partNumbers: Nismo 740cc injectors, DeatschWerks DW300 fuel pump
mods.installNotes: Swap all 6 injectors at the fuel rail. Drop tank to replace fuel pump. Fresh O-rings on all injector connections. ECU retune mandatory to calibrate new flow rates.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbochargers
mods.description: Replace the factory ceramic T28 turbos with stronger ball-bearing units for faster spool, higher power potential, and elimination of the ceramic wheel failure risk.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory turbos from the exhaust manifold. Bolt-on replacements use stock manifold and plumbing. Transfer oil and water lines. New gaskets required throughout. Retune mandatory. 10+ hours.

mods.name: Standalone ECU
mods.description: Full standalone engine management for the RB26DETT. Required for high-power builds and provides complete control over fueling, ignition, boost, and ATTESA.
mods.partNumbers: Link G4X PlugIn R34 GTR, Motec M150 with R34 PnP harness
mods.installNotes: Plug-in units are simplest. Configure RB26 base map and tune on dyno. Set up boost control, launch control, anti-lag if desired. ATTESA integration via CAN bus. Professional tuning essential.

mods.name: Built Engine Internals
mods.description: Forged pistons, rods, and upgraded head studs prepare the RB26 for 600+ hp. The cast iron block is incredibly strong but stock internals limit boost.
mods.partNumbers: Nitto 2.8L stroker kit, Brian Crower BC6238 rods, ARP 202-4308 head studs
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out rebuild. Machine block, install forged internals, deck block, and torque head studs to spec. Address all gaskets, bearings, and timing belt. Budget 50+ hours including machine work.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Modern adjustable coilovers unlock the R34's chassis potential with precise ride height and damping control, essential for handling the increased power.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins Road & Track, HKS Hipermax IV GT 80230-AN008
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Match front and rear ride heights for proper ATTESA AWD balance. Set damping to mid-range for street. Full alignment mandatory.
